zh.Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales: 威爾士卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達
zh.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利納納其 艾隆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys於1155年出生在英國威爾斯時，他的父親Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales32歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis24歲。他至少有1個兒子。他於1187年登記服兵役。他去世於1230年在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利納納其 艾隆享年75歲，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys于1155年出生在英国威尔斯时，他的父亲Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales32岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis24岁。他至少有1个儿子。他于1187年登记服兵役。他去世于1230年在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾利納納其 艾隆享年75岁，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Hen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys was born in 1155, in Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, was 32 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, was 24. He had at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1187. He died in 1230, in Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys est né en 1155, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1187. Il est décédé en 1230, à Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys 1155 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales 32 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis 24. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1187 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

it.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys è nato il nel 1155 nel Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1187. Morì nel 1230, nel Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales: ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアストラタ フロリダ
ja.Pebidiog, Pembrokeshire, Wales: ウェールズペンブロケシュアイア
ja.Y, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアラネルチ アエロン
ja.lifeSummary: Maelgwn Hen ap Rhysが1155年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesは32歳，母Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisは24歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1187年に兵役登録をした。彼は1230年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアラネルチ アエロンで75歳で死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアストラタ フロリダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys(이)가 1155년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(은)는 24세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1187년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1230년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 랜르치 아이런에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르 스트라타 플로리다에 묻혔다.

pt.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys nasceu em 1155, em Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1187. Ele faleceu em 1230, em Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Gales.

ro.Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Wales: Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys родился в 1155 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1187 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности лланнирч аирон, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности страта флорида, кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maelgwn Hen ap Rhys nació en 1155, en Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1187. Murió en 1230, en Llannerch Aeron, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Gales.
